content: Hello, I'm FinanceBot, your professional finance assistant. I can help with personal finance, investing, banking, economics, financial planning, and even look up live stock prices—how can I assist you today?
give me the stock price of sp500

The S&P 500 is an index, not an individual stock, so it doesn't have a "stock price." However, you can track the value of the S&P 500 through ETFs like SPY (SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust), which closely mirrors the index's performance.

Would you like me to fetch the current price of SPY or any other S&P 500-related ETF?
{"ticker": "SPY", "company": "State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF T", "price": 738.65, "currency": "USD", "change_percent": -0.07, "market_cap": null, "52w_high": 749.53, "52w_low": 575.6}

The current price of SPY (SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust) is $738.65 USD, with a change of -0.07%. Its 52-week high is $749.53, and the 52-week low is $575.60.

Let me know if you'd like further details or assistance!
